title: kohautia gracilis
side_effects: Kohautia gracilis can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and gastrointestinal issues. Some people may experience dizziness, nausea, or vomiting after ingesting the plant, which can be exacerbated by excessive consumption or prolonged use. Furthermore, using kohautia gracilis in place of prescribed medication without consulting a healthcare professional can lead to interactions with other medications and worsen underlying health conditions. In severe cases, improper use of the plant can cause more serious complications, such as organ damage or respiratory failure.
